name: ui_feature_inserts
purpose: Short reusable UI inserts for advanced BlackBox features (drop-in for the final 3-min cut). Not a full demo cut.

memory_insert.mp4.feature: Native Managed Agents memory mounts visible on intake
ui_signals: NATIVE CLAUDE MEMORY MOUNTED card with bb-platform-priors (READ_ONLY), bb-forensic-learnings-{case_key} (READ_WRITE), promotion gated by verification ledger
Right-rail MEMORY MOUNTS panel mirroring the same three mounts

steering_insert.mp4.feature: Operator steering of running forensic agent (audit trail)
steering_insert.mp4.steer_message: Focus on whether the operator's tunnel hypothesis is supported by telemetry.
steering_insert.mp4.caveat: Replay path appends the steer to the durable audit JSONL but does not re-route the prerecorded stream. Live-pipeline path drains the same JSONL and incorporates it via session.steer(). The visible audit history at GET /steer/{job_id} is the real artifact.

ui_signals: Side-by-side BEFORE/AFTER for src/controllers/pid_controller.cpp (clamp on integral_ + output_)
HUMAN APPROVAL REQUIRED gate with 'Patch will NOT be applied until an engineer decides below.'
APPROVE PATCH / REJECT PATCH buttons + optional note field

rollback_insert.mp4.feature: Time-travel rollback over L1-L4 memory checkpoints
ui_signals: Provenance column shows replay tag for both seeded checkpoints
rollback_insert.mp4.note: Bare HTMX fragment — no _base.html wrapper. Editor: pair with B-roll narration explaining auditability.

evidence_trace_insert.mp4.feature: Glass-box evidence trace — claim ↔ artifact wiring
ui_signals: Evidence used: telemetry_window (rtk_status.csv), frame (front_cam_0042.jpg), chrony_log (chrony.log) — each with source path + t_ns + snippet
Discarded hypotheses with confidence at drop (operator's tunnel hypothesis, GPS multipath canyon)

inserts.preview_contact_sheet.png: 3x2 tile of one representative frame per insert (last cell blank)
